---
title: "simulation.Rmd"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-29"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(spatstat.geom)
library(spatstat.random)
library(spatstat.explore)
library(SpatialExperiment)
library(spicyR)
library(TreeBH)
library(DART)
library(purrr)
library(dplyr)

source("R/globals.R")
source("R/simulation_helpers.R")
source("R/benchmarking_helpers.R")
source("R/pfilter.R")
```

# Global Variables

```{r globals}
WIN <- owin(c(0, 1000), c(0, 1000))

SIGNAL_WEIGHTS <- c(0.5, 0.7, 0.9, 0.99)

dir.create("results/simulation", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("results/spicy",      recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

# Single Measure (20 Subjects)

```{r single_simulate}
single_df <- purrr::map_dfr(1:20, function(s) {
  control_part <- simulate_one_subject_consistent(
    subject_id  = s,
    n_images    = 1,
    win         = WIN,
    condition   = "control",
    add_signal  = FALSE,
    total_cells = 5000
  )
  signal_part <- simulate_one_subject_consistent(
    subject_id    = s + 20,
    n_images      = 1,
    win           = WIN,
    condition     = "signal",
    add_signal    = TRUE,
    signal_weight = 0.99,
    total_cells   = 5000
  )
  bind_rows(control_part, signal_part)
})

saveRDS(single_df, "results/simulation/single_df.rds")
```

```{r single_spicy}
spe_single         <- make_spe_from_df(single_df)
spicy_single_sub   <- run_spicy_contrast(spe_single, "control", "signal", "sub")
spicy_single_major <- run_spicy_contrast(spe_single, "control", "signal", "major")

saveRDS(spicy_single_sub,   "results/spicy/spicy_single_sub.rds")
saveRDS(spicy_single_major, "results/spicy/spicy_single_major.rds")

topPairs(spicy_single_sub)
spicyBoxPlot(spicy_single_sub, from = "CD4_T",    to = "NK")
spicyBoxPlot(spicy_single_sub, from = "CD8_T",    to = "NK")
spicyBoxPlot(spicy_single_sub, from = "Memory_T", to = "NK")
```

## Sensitivity Analysis — Single Measure

```{r single_sensitivity_simulate}
single_sensitivity_dfs <- purrr::map(
  SIGNAL_WEIGHTS,
  function(sw) {
    message(sprintf("Simulating signal_weight = %.2f (single measure)", sw))

    purrr::map_dfr(1:20, function(s) {
      control_part <- simulate_one_subject_consistent(
        subject_id  = s,
        n_images    = 1,
        win         = WIN,
        condition   = "control",
        add_signal  = FALSE,
        total_cells = 5000
      )
      signal_part <- simulate_one_subject_consistent(
        subject_id    = s + 20,
        n_images      = 1,
        win           = WIN,
        condition     = "signal",
        add_signal    = TRUE,
        signal_weight = sw,
        total_cells   = 5000
      )
      bind_rows(control_part, signal_part)
    }) %>%
      mutate(signal_weight = sw)
  }
) %>%
  set_names(paste0("sw_", SIGNAL_WEIGHTS))

saveRDS(single_sensitivity_dfs, "results/simulation/single_sensitivity_dfs.rds")
```

```{r single_sensitivity_spicy}
single_sensitivity_spicy <- purrr::imap(single_sensitivity_dfs, function(df, sw_name) {
  message(sprintf("Running spicy for %s (single measure)", sw_name))
  spe <- make_spe_from_df(df)
  list(
    sub   = run_spicy_contrast(spe, "control", "signal", "sub"),
    major = run_spicy_contrast(spe, "control", "signal", "major")
  )
}) %>%
  set_names(names(single_sensitivity_dfs))

saveRDS(single_sensitivity_spicy, "results/spicy/single_sensitivity_spicy.rds")
```

# Repeated Measures (20 Subjects, 5 Images Each)

```{r repeated_simulate}
repeated_df <- purrr::map_dfr(1:20, function(s) {
  control_part <- simulate_one_subject_consistent(
    subject_id  = s,
    n_images    = 5,
    win         = WIN,
    condition   = "control",
    add_signal  = FALSE,
    total_cells = 5000
  )
  signal_part <- simulate_one_subject_consistent(
    subject_id    = s + 20,
    n_images      = 5,
    win           = WIN,
    condition     = "signal",
    add_signal    = TRUE,
    signal_weight = 0.99,
    total_cells   = 5000
  )
  bind_rows(control_part, signal_part)
})

saveRDS(repeated_df, "results/simulation/repeated_df.rds")
```

```{r repeated_spicy}
spe_repeated         <- make_spe_from_df(repeated_df)
spicy_repeated_sub   <- run_spicy_contrast(spe_repeated, "control", "signal", "sub")
spicy_repeated_major <- run_spicy_contrast(spe_repeated, "control", "signal", "major")

saveRDS(spicy_repeated_sub,   "results/spicy/spicy_repeated_sub.rds")
saveRDS(spicy_repeated_major, "results/spicy/spicy_repeated_major.rds")

topPairs(spicy_repeated_sub)
spicyBoxPlot(spicy_repeated_sub, from = "CD4_T",    to = "NK")
spicyBoxPlot(spicy_repeated_sub, from = "CD8_T",    to = "NK")
spicyBoxPlot(spicy_repeated_sub, from = "Memory_T", to = "NK")
spicy_repeated_sub$p.value["CD4_T__NK",]
spicy_repeated_sub$p.value["CD8_T__NK",]
spicy_repeated_sub$p.value["Memory_T__NK",]
```

## Sensitivity Analysis — Repeated Measures

```{r repeated_sensitivity_simulate}
repeated_sensitivity_dfs <- purrr::map(
  SIGNAL_WEIGHTS,
  function(sw) {
    message(sprintf("Simulating signal_weight = %.2f (repeated measures)", sw))

    purrr::map_dfr(1:20, function(s) {
      control_part <- simulate_one_subject_consistent(
        subject_id  = s,
        n_images    = 5,
        win         = WIN,
        condition   = "control",
        add_signal  = FALSE,
        total_cells = 5000
      )
      signal_part <- simulate_one_subject_consistent(
        subject_id    = s + 20,
        n_images      = 5,
        win           = WIN,
        condition     = "signal",
        add_signal    = TRUE,
        signal_weight = sw,
        total_cells   = 5000
      )
      bind_rows(control_part, signal_part)
    }) %>%
      mutate(signal_weight = sw)
  }
) %>%
  set_names(paste0("sw_", SIGNAL_WEIGHTS))

saveRDS(repeated_sensitivity_dfs, "results/simulation/repeated_sensitivity_dfs.rds")
```

```{r repeated_sensitivity_spicy}
repeated_sensitivity_spicy <- purrr::imap(repeated_sensitivity_dfs, function(df, sw_name) {
  message(sprintf("Running spicy for %s (repeated measures)", sw_name))
  spe <- make_spe_from_df(df)
  list(
    sub   = run_spicy_contrast(spe, "control", "signal", "sub"),
    major = run_spicy_contrast(spe, "control", "signal", "major")
  )
}) %>%
  set_names(names(repeated_sensitivity_dfs))

saveRDS(repeated_sensitivity_spicy, "results/spicy/repeated_sensitivity_spicy.rds")
```

# Sanity Checks

```{r sanity_helpers}
plot_image_signal_check <- function(df, image_name, title_prefix = "") {
  df %>%
    filter(
      image_id == image_name,
      cellType_sub %in% c("NK", "CD4_T", "CD8_T", "Memory_T")
    ) %>%
    mutate(cell_class = ifelse(cellType_sub == "NK", "NK", "T cell")) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y, colour = cell_class)) +
    geom_point(size = 1, alpha = 0.7) +
    coord_equal() +
    theme_bw() +
    ggtitle(paste0(title_prefix, image_name))
}

plot_density_heatmap <- function(df, image_name, title_prefix = "") {
  df %>%
    filter(
      image_id == image_name,
      cellType_sub %in% c("NK", "CD4_T", "CD8_T", "Memory_T")
    ) %>%
    mutate(cell_class = ifelse(cellType_sub == "NK", "NK", "T cell")) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y)) +
    stat_density_2d_filled(aes(fill = after_stat(level)), contour = TRUE) +
    facet_wrap(~cell_class) +
    coord_equal() +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(
      title = paste0(title_prefix, image_name),
      fill  = "Density"
    )
}
```

## Single Measure

```{r sanity_single}
plot_image_signal_check(single_df, "control_subj_1_img_1",  title_prefix = "[Single] ")
plot_image_signal_check(single_df, "signal_subj_21_img_1",  title_prefix = "[Single] ")
plot_density_heatmap(single_df,    "control_subj_1_img_1",  title_prefix = "[Single] ")
plot_density_heatmap(single_df,    "signal_subj_21_img_1",  title_prefix = "[Single] ")
```

## Repeated Measures

```{r sanity_repeated}
plot_image_signal_check(repeated_df, "control_subj_1_img_1", title_prefix = "[Repeated] ")
plot_image_signal_check(repeated_df, "signal_subj_6_img_2",  title_prefix = "[Repeated] ")
plot_density_heatmap(repeated_df,    "control_subj_2_img_1", title_prefix = "[Repeated] ")
plot_density_heatmap(repeated_df,    "signal_subj_7_img_5",  title_prefix = "[Repeated] ")
```
